blockType.Description: block type indicating which foods were go and which foods were no-go

blockInstructions.Description: instruction text shown to participants at the start of each block

trialNoPerBlock.Description: trial number out of 100 trials within a block (0-99)

stimRating.Description: participant's rating for the stimulus on the relevant attribute (health or taste; 0-100)

stimStatus.Description: whether the stimulus is a go or a no-go stimulus

respCorrect.Description: correct keypress response for the trial

respKey.Description: participant's keypress response for the trial

respOutcome.Description: whether the participant's response was correct or incorrect

respRT.Description: response time for keypress responses in seconds
